title: ieGeek 2K WiFi Baby Monitor with Two Cameras, Phone App & 5" Split-Screen Control, Smart Video Camera, Night Vision, Automatic Tracking, PTZ, Crying Detection, Temperature/Humidity Sensor, Baby Gift
features: 【LCD Split Screen & APP Control 】-2 in 1 ieGeek wifi baby monitor . LCD split control: 5''screen coverage 1000ft,equipped with two cameras meets your monitoring needs in different rooms (no wifi ),App control: If you want to go out, you can obtain information and control through the mobile app anytime and anywhere. Whether it’s a mother cooking in the kitchen or a father leaving for the airport early in the morning, they can all check on baby in real time.

【2K Night Vision & Clear Audio】 Baby monitor is newly upgraded with 2k and 10m color night vision, which helps observe the baby's facial expressions and even visually observe breathing (especially important for babies unwell). At the same time, high-quality audio allows us to hear the baby's voice immediately and judge the baby's status as accurately as possible. ieGeek is committed to bringing a more detailed safety experience to new parents. Nothing is more important than the safety of baby.

【Automatic Tracking & PTZ & 4x Zoom】 Wifi Baby monitor with phone app supports automatic tracking, which can accurately capture every moment of your baby's movement. There is nothing more regrettable than missing the moment of baby's growth. For example, learn to walk or smile for the first time, you can also share it with other family. Video baby monitor has a 355° range and 60° tilt, with the 4x zoom, you can still get a good view even if you can't place the camera directly next to the crib.

【Cry + Danger Zone Detection 】Instant Notification - Sensitive cry detection will often transmit the baby's cry to you as quickly as possible, and you can also customize the "Danger Zone", monitor will notify you if the baby moves out of the area, This is especially helpful when your baby reaches an ambitious age and thinks crawling out of the crib seems fun . Reply within 12h on working days/unconditional returns within 30 days/2-year warranty. ieGeek will be responsible until the last step.

【Comprehensive Intelligent Care】 - Deal with Separation Anxiety Correctly - When baby is born and become parents for the first time, we will all experience chaos. ieGeek baby smart monitors is committed to becoming a caring friend to help new parents make role transitions. More functions of video baby monitor are waiting for you. 3000mAh built-in battery / temperature and humidity detection / 2-way audio / multiple lullabies / one-click calling / feeding reminder, etc. BEST newborn baby gifts.

This is a two-in-one LCD screen and APP control, whether it is a mom doing yoga or a dad at work, they can check the baby's situation in real time. Is ieGeek 5'' Baby Monitor able to connect to multiple cameras? Yes, it supports simultaneous connection of 2 cameras, and frequency division preview, meets your monitoring needs in two rooms, or two kids Is the image clear enough? ieGeek baby monitor is newly upgraded with 2k and 10m color night vision, which helps observe the baby's facial expressions and even visually observe breathing. Is the process of connecting the monitor and mobile app complicated? Don’t worry at all. The product page has attached an operation instruction video for connecting the local display and mobile app, and you can quickly connect within 1-2 minutes. Easy to set up and no tools to buy, saving you every penny. Does the camera offer playback? Yes, you can choose to use an Memory card or cloud storage service.
